query:
-- Step 1: Fix the 66 unique Excel-serial-date items by converting their dates to ISO format
-- Excel serial 46054 = 2026-02-01, 46057 = 2026-02-04, 46058 = 2026-02-05, 46080 = 2026-02-27
-- Formula: DATE_ADD('1899-12-30', INTERVAL invoiceDate DAY)
UPDATE billing_items
SET invoiceDate = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD('1899-12-30', INTERVAL CAST(invoiceDate AS UNSIGNED) DAY), '%Y-%m-%d')
WHERE invoiceDate REGEXP '^[0-9]{5}$'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM (
      SELECT externalId AS eid FROM billing_items AS proper_item2
      WHERE proper_item2.invoiceDate NOT REGEXP '^[0-9]{5}$'
    ) AS tmp
    JOIN billing_items AS proper_item 
      ON proper_item.externalId = tmp.eid
      AND proper_item.invoiceNumber = billing_items.invoiceNumber
      AND proper_item.description = billing_items.description
      AND proper_item.contactName = billing_items.contactName
      AND proper_item.lineAmount = billing_items.lineAmount
  );

SELECT ROW_COUNT() AS dates_fixed;

-- Step 1: Fix the 66 unique Excel-serial-date items by converting their dates to ISO format
-- Excel serial 46054 = 2026-02-01, 46057 = 2026-02-04, 46058 = 2026-02-05, 46080 = 2026-02-27
-- Formula: DATE_ADD('1899-12-30', INTERVAL invoiceDate DAY)
UPDATE billing_items
SET invoiceDate = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD('1899-12-30', INTERVAL CAST(invoiceDate AS UNSIGNED) DAY), '%Y-%m-%d')
WHERE invoiceDate REGEXP '^[0-9]{5}$'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM (
      SELECT externalId AS eid FROM billing_items AS proper_item2
      WHERE proper_item2.invoiceDate NOT REGEXP '^[0-9]{5}$'
    ) AS tmp
    JOIN billing_items AS proper_item 
      ON proper_item.externalId = tmp.eid
      AND proper_item.invoiceNumber = billing_items.invoiceNumber
      AND proper_item.description = billing_items.description
      AND proper_item.contactName = billing_items.contactName
      AND proper_item.lineAmount = billing_items.lineAmount
  );

SELECT ROW_COUNT() AS dates_fixed;
